backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the CBSE Board Study App defining all data types (UserProfile, Chapter, Note, MockTest, etc.) and persistent per-user state maps; includes authorization mixin for access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (parent account data layer, login page parent buttons, parent dashboard) to their affected files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and notable changes, serving as a build/documentation reference for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Board Saathi PWA, configuring viewport, PWA manifest, iOS/Safari meta tags, favicons, SEO/Open Graph metadata, and mounting the React app root.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Board Saathi specifying app name, theme colors, display mode, orientation, and icon assets in multiple sizes including a maskable variant.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with precaching of app shell assets, old cache cleanup on activation, and network fallback with background cache refresh for HTML requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full client-side router using TanStack Router with auth guards for students and parents, wrapping all pages in a QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AIAssistant.tsx: Floating chat widget ('Saathi') that answers user questions about the app by matching input against a local FAQ matcher and rendering simple bold markdown.
frontend/src/components/DailyView.tsx: Displays and manages planner tasks for a specific date, supporting add, toggle-complete, and delete operations via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a sidebar navigation, notification bell with unread count, guest detection, logout, and a PWA install banner.
frontend/src/components/NotesSection.tsx: Per-chapter notes panel that lets users add text and image-attached notes and delete them, using React Query hooks for persistence.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Fixed bottom banner that prompts the user to install the PWA, using the usePWAInstall hook to control visibility and trigger the native install prompt.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsSection: React component that displays, adds, and deletes Q&A pairs for a given chapter, with a collapsible answer view per question card.
frontend/src/components/QuoteOfTheDayCar: Displays a daily motivational quote in a styled gradient card using a utility function to select the quote.
frontend/src/components/StreakCard.tsx: Shows the user's current and top study streak with milestone badges earned at 3, 7, and 30 days.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook that manages PWA install prompt state, tracks installation status, and handles banner dismissal with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-access layer exposing React Query hooks for all local-storage-backed entities (subjects, chapters, notes, questions, flashcards, tests, planner tasks, reminders, targets, streaks, and user profile).
frontend/src/hooks/useReminderAlarm.ts: Hook that provides play, preview, and stop controls for reminder alarm audio files using an HTML Audio element ref.
A React hook that schedules browser notifications 5 minutes before reminders and plays alarm sounds at the exact reminder time, using setTimeout and a session-level Set to avoid duplicate scheduling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Nunito and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a deep teal and warm orange design token palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: A static informational page that describes all major app features (subjects, flashcards, mock tests, planner, targets, reminders, revision, question bank, progress tracker) with icons, descriptions, and usage tips.
frontend/src/pages/AttemptMockTestPage.t: A page for taking a mock test that displays MCQ questions one at a time with an elapsed timer, records selected answers, and submits them to get a score report.
frontend/src/pages/ChaptersPage.tsx: A page that lists chapters for a given subject, allowing users to add chapters, toggle completion status, and expand each chapter to view or add notes and questions via tabs.
frontend/src/pages/CreateMockTestPage.ts: A form page for creating a new MCQ-based mock test, allowing users to set a test name, select a subject, and add/remove questions with four options and a correct answer selection.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays a personalized greeting, overall study progress, quick stats (chapters, mock tests, scores, revisions), and quick-navigation links to key app sections. Fetches data via custom hooks and records a daily login on mount.
frontend/src/pages/FlashcardsPage.tsx: Flashcard management page allowing users to create, filter by subject, flip, mark as learned/unlearned, shuffle, and delete flashcards. Uses custom query hooks for CRUD operations and local state for UI interactions.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page supporting student login, registration, forgot-password recovery, and separate parent login/registration flows, all backed by localStorage-based credential utilities.
frontend/src/pages/MockTestsPage.tsx: Lists all created mock tests with attempt counts and best scores, and provides options to create, take, view reports for, or delete each test via navigation and query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/MyAchievementsPage.ts: Achievements page that displays the user's rank, personal-best stats (chapters, streaks, test scores, fastest test time), and earned badges using data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ParentDashboard.tsx: Parent portal dashboard that displays a linked child's study data (subjects, chapters, notes, mock tests, streaks, targets) fetched from localStorage, and allows parents to send typed messages (comments, scolds, appreciations) to the child.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: Monthly calendar planner page that shows task counts per day, supports month navigation, and opens a DailyView dialog when a day cell is clicked to manage that day's tasks.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that displays and allows editing of name, school, and class fields stored in localStorage, with guest-mode fallback prompts and a service-worker-based app update mechanism.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Progress tracker page that shows overview stats (tasks, targets, mock test scores), per-subject chapter completion progress bars, and a list of the five most recent test attempts.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionBankPage.tsx: Question bank page with subject and chapter filter dropdowns that fetches and lists questions, each rendered in a card with a toggle to reveal the answer.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersPage.tsx: Page for managing reminders with add/delete functionality, alarm sound selection with preview, and browser notification permission handling. Uses reminder scheduler hook to trigger notifications and alarms at scheduled times.
frontend/src/pages/RevisionPage.tsx: Page displaying pending and completed spaced-repetition revision tasks with due date status indicators. Allows users to mark tasks as completed and shows subject/chapter names resolved from IDs.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Page listing all subjects with chapter completion progress bars and color/icon assignments. Supports adding new subjects via a dialog and navigates to a subject detail page on click.
frontend/src/pages/TargetsPage.tsx: Page for managing study targets with title, description, and deadline fields, supporting add, complete/incomplete toggle, and delete operations. Displays active and completed targets with deadline urgency badges.
frontend/src/pages/TestReportPage.tsx: Page showing the report for the latest mock test attempt, including score percentage, correct/total count, time taken, and a summary of all previous attempts. Fetches attempt data by test ID from the URL params.
frontend/src/utils/faqMatcher.ts: Defines a FAQ database with keyword arrays and response strings for various app features, and exports a `matchFAQ` function that finds the best matching FAQ entry based on user input keywords.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageService.t: Provides a comprehensive offline data layer using localStorage/sessionStorage, including user account management (CRUD, hashing, validation), session handling, and namespaced get/set helpers for all student data types.
frontend/src/utils/quotesData.ts: Exports an array of motivational study quotes and a `getQuoteOfTheDay` function that deterministically selects a quote based on the day of the year.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, feature list with IDs and descriptions, architectural notes, and known issues for an educational app with student and parent portals.
